Interface GameEventListener

All Known Implementing Classes:
GameEventAdapter
public interface GameEventListener
Observer interface used by the model to notify game changes.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    onGameOver(Player winner)
    Called when the game has a winner.
    void
    onMessage(String message)
    Called when a message should be shown to the user.
    void
    onStateChanged(GameModel model)
    Called when visible game state changes.

  • Method Details

    • onStateChanged

      void onStateChanged(GameModel model)
      Called when visible game state changes.
      Parameters:
      model - changed model

    • onMessage

      void onMessage(String message)
      Called when a message should be shown to the user.
      Parameters:
      message - readable message

    • onGameOver

      void onGameOver(Player winner)
      Called when the game has a winner.
      Parameters:
      winner - surviving player
